description_long: This is a modern main battle tank with a low-profile, angular turret and a long, rifled main cannon extending from the front. The hull and turret are covered in sloped, modular armor plating, with additional protective grilles at the rear. The tank features a camouflage paint scheme in muted desert tones, and visible hatches, periscopes, and external storage racks. A prominent radio antenna extends vertically from the rear of the turret, and there are several visible weapon mounts, including a coaxial machine gun and a secondary mount on the turret roof. The vehicle is equipped with wide, reinforced tracks for mobility over rough terrain, and the overall design emphasizes survivability and firepower.
description: A heavily armored main battle tank with a long cannon, desert camouflage, and reinforced tracks, featuring multiple weapon mounts and protective grilles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, main cannon, and frontal lights, emphasizing the tank's imposing width and low profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannon, side armor skirts, turret details, and the rear storage rack with antenna.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the protective grille, exhaust vents, and the back of the tracks, as well as the rear armor and storage area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, side armor, turret features, and rear grilles, with visible hatches and equipment.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret front, one coaxial machine gun, and one secondary machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, modular armor plating on the hull and turret, reinforced side skirts, and protective grilles at the rear.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Desert camouflage with irregular tan and gray patches in a disruptive pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White cross insignia on the left turret side, small stenciled numbers and symbols on the hull front.
